_source: Mock Datadog MSA — realistic deviations from the ShadowBuyer standard. Replace with real captured MSA when available.

clauses.title: Limitation of Liability
clauses.text: Vendor's aggregate liability shall not exceed three (3) months of fees paid under the applicable Order Form. Excludes consequential, indirect, and lost-profits damages.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Vendor will indemnify Customer solely for direct IP infringement claims. Indemnity excludes claims arising from Customer modifications, combinations, or open-source components.

clauses.title: Data Processing Addendum
clauses.text: DPA available upon request. Customer telemetry and metadata may be used to improve the Service, including model training and benchmarking, on an aggregated and de-identified basis.

clauses.title: Auto-Renewal
clauses.text: Subscription auto-renews for successive 12-month terms. Customer must provide written non-renewal notice at least ninety (90) days before the end of the current term.

clauses.title: Price Lock
clauses.text: Vendor reserves the right to adjust per-unit pricing at each renewal at vendor's then-current list rates.

clauses.title: Termination for Convenience
clauses.text: Customer may not terminate for convenience during any committed term. Early termination requires payment of all remaining committed fees.

clauses.title: SLA Credits
clauses.text: Service Levels: 99.5% monthly uptime, measured on a per-region basis. Credits capped at 10% of monthly fee. Customer must request credits in writing within thirty (30) days.

clauses.title: Subprocessors
clauses.text: Vendor may engage subprocessors at its discretion. Vendor will use commercially reasonable efforts to notify Customer of material changes.

clauses.title: Audit Rights
clauses.text: Vendor will make available, upon written request and Vendor's reasonable discretion, the most recent SOC 2 Type II report under NDA. No on-site audit rights.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Confidentiality obligations survive for three (3) years after termination.

clauses.title: IP Assignment
clauses.text: Each party retains its pre-existing IP. Vendor receives a perpetual, royalty-free license to any feedback, suggestions, or ideas provided by Customer.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. VENDOR DISCLAIMS ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

clauses.title: Governing Law & Venue
clauses.text: New York law. Exclusive jurisdiction in the courts of New York County, New York. Jury trial waived.

clauses.title: Publicity Rights
clauses.text: Customer grants Vendor the right to use Customer's name and logo on Vendor's customer list and marketing materials without further consent.
